primary_link.title: Neural Garbage Collection: Learning to Forget while Learning to Reason

papers.summary: Chain-of-thought reasoning has driven striking advances in language model capability, yet every reasoning step grows the KV cache, creating a bottleneck to scaling this paradigm further. Current approaches manage these constraints on the model's behalf using hand-designed criteria. A more scalable approach would let end-to-end learning subsume this design choice entirely, following a broader pattern in deep learning. primary_link.title: HybridGen: Efficient LLM Generative Inference via CPU-GPU Hybrid Computing

papers.summary: As modern LLMs support thousands to millions of tokens, KV caches grow to hundreds of gigabytes, stressing memory capacity and bandwidth. Existing solutions, such as KV cache pruning and offloading, alleviate these but underutilize hardware by relying solely on either GPU or CPU for attention computing, and considering yet limited CPU local memory for KV cache storage. We propose HybridGen, an efficient hybrid attention framework for long-context LLM inference. HybridGen enables CPU-GPU collabor

links.title: Too Correct to Learn: Reinforcement Learning on Saturated Reasoning Data

primary_link.title: Too Correct to Learn: Reinforcement Learning on Saturated Reasoning Data

papers.summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) enhances LLM reasoning, yet a paradox emerges as models scale: strong base models saturate standard benchmarks (e.g., MATH), yielding correct but homogeneous solutions. In such environments, the lack of failure cases causes the advantage signal in group-relative algorithms (e.g., GRPO) to vanish, driving policies into mode collapse. To address this, we propose Constrained Uniform Top-K Sampling (CUTS), a parameter-free decoding strategy enforcing structure-preserving
papers.summary_zh: Reinforcement Learning (RL) 增強了 LLM 的推理能力，然而，隨著模型規模的擴大，一個悖論出現了：強大的 base models 使標準 benchmarks（例如 MATH）達到飽和，產生了正確但同質的解決方案。在這樣的環境中，由於缺乏失敗案例，導致 group-relative algorithms（例如 GRPO）中的 advantage signal 消失，將 policies 推向 mode collapse。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 Constrained Uniform Top-K Sampling (CUTS)，這是一種 enforce structure-preserving 的 parameter-free decoding strategy。
papers.title: Too Correct to Learn: Reinforcement Learning on Saturated Reasoning Data
papers.title_zh: 過於正確以致難以學習：在飽和推理數據上的 Reinforcement Learning

papers.summary: Extending a fully post-trained language model with new domain capabilities is fundamentally limited by monolithic training paradigms: retraining from scratch is expensive and scales poorly, while continued training often degrades existing capabilities. primary_link.title: Copy-as-Decode: Grammar-Constrained Parallel Prefill for LLM Editing

papers.summary: LLMs edit text and code by autoregressively regenerating the full output, even when most tokens appear verbatim in the input. We study Copy-as-Decode, a decoding-layer mechanism that recasts edit generation as structured decoding over a two-primitive grammar: <copy lines="i-j"/> references an input line range, <gen>...</gen> emits new content. A token-level FSM guarantees syntactic validity, and a serving-layer primitive updates the KV cache for each copy span via a single parallel-prefill forwa

papers.summary_zh: 遊戲開發位於創意設計和複雜軟體工程的交叉點，需要遊戲引擎、即時迴圈以及跨多個檔案緊密耦合的狀態共同協調。雖然 Large Language Models (LLMs) 和程式碼代理現在可以輕鬆解決孤立的程式設計任務，但當被要求從高階設計中產生一個完全可玩的遊戲時，它們卻屢屢碰壁，在跨檔案不一致、場景接線錯誤和邏輯不連貫等問題上崩潰。我們

links.title: Understanding the Prompt Sensitivity

primary_link.title: Understanding the Prompt Sensitivity

papers.summary: Prompt sensitivity, which refers to how strongly the output of a large language model (LLM) depends on the exact wording of its input prompt, raises concerns among users about the LLM's stability and reliability. In this work, we consider LLMs as multivariate functions and perform a first-order Taylor expansion, thereby analyzing the relationship between meaning-preserving prompts, their gradients, and the log probabilities of the model's next token. We derive an upper bound on the difference be
papers.summary_zh: Prompt 敏感性是指大型語言模型 (LLM) 的輸出如何強烈地依賴於其輸入 prompt 的確切措辭，這引發了用戶對 LLM 穩定性和可靠性的擔憂。在這項工作中，我們將 LLM 視為多變數函數 (multivariate functions) 並執行一階 Taylor 展開 (first-order Taylor expansion)，從而分析了意義保留的 prompt、它們的梯度 (gradients) 以及模型下一個 token 的對數機率 (log probabilities) 之間的關係。我們推導出了差異的上限。

papers.summary_zh: 基於 Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining (CLAP) 的音訊-文字檢索系統 (Audio-text retrieval systems) 在傳統基準測試 (benchmarks) 上取得了強勁的性能；然而，這些基準測試依賴於與現實世界搜索行為顯著不同的 caption-style queries，限制了它們對實際檢索穩健性 (retrieval robustness) 的評估。我們提出了 Omni-Embed-Audio (OEA)，這是一種檢索導向的編碼器，利用具有原生音訊理解 (native audio understanding) 能力的多模態 LLM。為了系統地評估超越 caption-style queries 的穩健性。

papers.summary_zh: 長期對話型大型語言模型 (LLM) 代理需要記憶系統 (memory systems)，這些系統能夠從歷史互動 (historical interactions) 中恢復相關證據，而不會用不相關的上下文 (irrelevant context) 壓倒回答階段。然而，現有的記憶系統，包括分層記憶系統，仍然經常僅依賴於向量相似度 (vector similarity) 進行檢索。這往往會產生膨脹的證據集 (bloated evidence sets)：添加許多表面上相似的對話回合對召回率 (recall) 的增加甚微，反而降低了檢索精確度 (retrieval precision)，並增加了。

papers.summary_zh: 零階優化 (Zeroth-Order optimization) 透過僅依賴前向傳播 (forward passes)，為 fine-tuning 大型語言模型提供了一種有前景的記憶體高效範式 (memory-efficient paradigm)。然而，其實際應用受到實際運行時間收斂 (wall-clock convergence) 緩慢和估計變異數 (estimation variance) 高的嚴重限制。在這項工作中，我們剖析了 ZO 演算法的運行時特性 (runtime characteristics)，並確定了一個關鍵的系統瓶頸 (system bottleneck)，其中擾動 (perturbations) 的生成和參數更新 (parameter updates) 佔訓練延遲 (training latency) 的 40% 以上。我們認為。

radar.summary: Mathematical problem solving remains a challenging test of reasoning for large language and multimodal models, yet existing benchmarks are limited in size, language coverage, and task diversity. radar.summary_zh: 儘管最近有所進展，視覺-語言編碼器仍面臨兩個核心局限性：(1) 語言與密集視覺特徵之間的弱對齊，這會影響 open-vocabulary semantic segmentation 等任務；(2) 細粒度視覺表示的高 Token 數量，這限制了對長影片的可擴展性。本研究旨在解決這兩個局限性。我們提出 T-REN (Text-aligned Region Encoder Network)，這是一種高效的編碼器，可將視覺資料映射到一組緊湊的文字對齊的區域層級...

primary_link.title: AnchorSeg: Language Grounded Query Banks for Reasoning Segmentation

links.title: How Much Cache Does Reasoning Need? Depth-Cache Tradeoffs in KV-Compressed Transformers

primary_link.title: How Much Cache Does Reasoning Need? Depth-Cache Tradeoffs in KV-Compressed Transformers

top5.summary:
The key-value (KV) cache is the dominant memory bottleneck during Transformer inference, yet little is known theoretically about how aggressively it can be compressed before multi-step reasoning degrades. We study this through $k$-hop pointer chasing on $n$ tokens under a shared KV cache of size $s$, attention dimension $m$, $H$ heads, $p$-bit precision, and a locality-respecting cache controller (satisfied by all standard KV-compression methods). We give three results.
  (1) Product depth lower
top5.summary_zh: 在 Transformer 推理過程中，key-value (KV) cache 是主要的記憶體瓶頸，然而關於在多步驟推理效能下降之前，它能被壓縮到何種程度，在理論上知之甚少。我們透過在共享的 KV cache（大小為 $s$）、注意力維度 $m$、$H$ 個注意力頭、$p$-bit 精度，以及一個遵循局部性原則的快取控制器（所有標準的 KV-compression 方法均能滿足此條件）下，對 $n$ 個 token 執行 $k$-hop pointer chasing 來研究此問題。我們提出了三個結果。
top5.title: How Much Cache Does Reasoning Need? Depth-Cache Tradeoffs in KV-Compressed Transformers
top5.title_zh: 推理需要多少快取？KV-Compressed Transformers 中的深度與快取權衡

links.title: Latent Phase-Shift Rollback: Inference-Time Error Correction via Residual Stream Monitoring and KV-Cache Steering

primary_link.title: Latent Phase-Shift Rollback: Inference-Time Error Correction via Residual Stream Monitoring and KV-Cache Steering

top5.summary: Large language models frequently commit unrecoverable reasoning errors mid-generation: once a wrong step is taken, subsequent tokens compound the mistake rather than correct it. We introduce $\textbf{Latent Phase-Shift Rollback}$ (LPSR): at each generation step, we monitor the residual stream at a critical layer lcrit, detect abrupt directional reversals (phase shifts) via a cosine-similarity $+$ entropy dual gate, and respond by rolling back the KV-cache and injecting a pre-computed steering ve
top5.summary_zh: 大型語言模型在生成過程中經常會犯下無法挽回的推理錯誤：一旦走錯一步，後續的 token 會使錯誤加劇而非修正。我們引入了 $	extbf{Latent Phase-Shift Rollback}$ (LPSR) 方法：在每個生成步驟中，我們監測關鍵層 lcrit 的 residual stream，透過 cosine-similarity + entropy 雙重門檻檢測突然的方向逆轉（phase shifts），並透過回溯 KV-cache 和注入預先計算的 steering ve 來做出反應。
top5.title: Latent Phase-Shift Rollback: Inference-Time Error Correction via Residual Stream Monitoring and KV-Cache Steering
top5.title_zh: Latent Phase-Shift Rollback：透過 Residual Stream 監測和 KV-Cache 導引實現推論時錯誤校正

links.title: WorldDB: A Vector Graph-of-Worlds Memory Engine with Ontology-Aware Write-Time Reconciliation

primary_link.title: WorldDB: A Vector Graph-of-Worlds Memory Engine with Ontology-Aware Write-Time Reconciliation

top5.summary: Persistent memory is the bottleneck separating stateless chatbots from long-running agentic systems. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over flat vector stores fragments facts into chunks, loses cross-session identity, and has no first-class notion of supersession or contradiction. Recent bitemporal knowledge-graph systems (Graphiti, Memento, Hydra DB) add typed edges and valid-time metadata, but the graph itself remains flat: no recursive composition, no content-addressed invariants on nodes,
top5.summary_zh: 永久記憶體是將無狀態聊天機器人與長期運行的 agentic systems 區分開來的瓶頸。在扁平向量儲存（flat vector stores）上執行的 Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) 將事實碎片化為區塊（chunks），失去了跨會話身份（cross-session identity），並且沒有首要的取代（supersession）或矛盾（contradiction）概念。最近的雙時間知識圖系統 (Graphiti, Memento, Hydra DB) 增加了類型化邊（typed edges）和有效時間元數據（valid-time metadata），但圖本身仍然是扁平的：沒有遞迴組成（recursive composition），節點上也沒有內容尋址不變量（content-addressed invariants）。
top5.title: WorldDB: A Vector Graph-of-Worlds Memory Engine with Ontology-Aware Write-Time Reconciliation
top5.title_zh: WorldDB：一個具備本體感知寫入時協調功能的向量「世界圖」記憶引擎

links.title: AJ-Bench: Benchmarking Agent-as-a-Judge for Environment-Aware Evaluation

primary_link.title: AJ-Bench: Benchmarking Agent-as-a-Judge for Environment-Aware Evaluation

top5.summary:
As reinforcement learning continues to scale the training of large language model-based agents, reliably verifying agent behaviors in complex environments has become increasingly challenging. Existing approaches rely on rule-based verifiers or LLM-as-a-Judge models, which struggle to generalize beyond narrow domains. Agent-as-a-Judge addresses this limitation by actively interacting with environments and tools to acquire verifiable evidence, yet its capabilities remain underexplored.
  We introd
top5.summary_zh: 隨著強化學習持續擴展大型語言模型代理（LLM-based agents）的訓練規模，在複雜環境中可靠地驗證代理行為變得越來越具挑戰性。現有方法依賴於基於規則的驗證器或 LLM-as-a-Judge 模型，這些模型難以在狹窄領域之外進行泛化。Agent-as-a-Judge 透過主動與環境和工具互動以獲取可驗證證據來解決此限制，然而其能力仍未被充分探索。
top5.title: AJ-Bench: Benchmarking Agent-as-a-Judge for Environment-Aware Evaluation
top5.title_zh: AJ-Bench：用於環境感知評估的 Agent-as-a-Judge 基準測試
